en.extract:
Vieillot's black weaver (Ploceus nigerrimus) is a species of bird in the family Ploceidae. It is found 
in southern Nigeria to Uganda, west Kenya, Angola and the Democratic Republic of the Congo. The common name is after the French ornithologist Louis Pierre Vieillot. 
This species was formerly considered to be conspecific with chestnut-and-black weaver (Ploceus castaneofuscus). The species were split based on the striking differences in the colour of the plumage.


References


External links
Vieillot's black weaver -  Species text in Weaver Watch.

[[File:072 Vieillot's black weaver building the start of a nest at Kibale forest National Park Photo by Giles Laurent.jpg|alt=Vieillot's black weaver starting a nest at Kibale Forest National Park, Uganda|thumb|Vieillot's black weaver starting a nest at [[Kibale Forest National Park]], Uganda]]
'''Vieillot's black weaver''' ('''''Ploceus nigerrimus''''') is a species of bird in the family [[Ploceidae]]. It is found 
in southern Nigeria to Uganda, west Kenya, Angola and the Democratic Republic of the Congo. The common name is after the French ornithologist [[Louis Pierre Vieillot]].<ref>{{cite book|last=Beolens|first=Bo|title=Whose Bird? Men and Women Commemorated in the Common Names of Birds|year=2003|publisher=Christopher Helm|location=London|page=352|author2=Watkins, Michael }}</ref> 

This species was formerly considered to be [[conspecific]] with [[chestnut-and-black weaver]] (''Ploceus castaneofuscus''). The species were split based on the striking differences in the colour of the plumage.<ref name=ioc>{{cite web| editor1-last=Gill | editor1-first=Frank | editor1-link=Frank Gill (ornithologist) | editor2-last=Donsker | editor2-first=David | editor3-last=Rasmussen | editor3-first=Pamela | editor3-link=Pamela Rasmussen | date=January 2023 | title=Old World sparrows, snowfinches, weavers | work=IOC World Bird List Version 13.1 | url=https://www.worldbirdnames.org/bow/weavers/ | publisher=International Ornithologists' Union | access-date=7 February 2023 }}</ref><ref name=bow>{{cite journal | last1=Craig | first1=A.J.F. | last2=del Hoyo | first2=J. |  last3=Collar | first3=N. | last4=Kirwan | first4=G.M. | date=2022 | title=Vieillot's Black Weaver (''Ploceus nigerrimus''), version 1.0 | editor1-last=Billerman | editor1-first=S.M. | editor2-last=Sly | editor2-first=N.D. | journal=Birds of the World | location=Ithaca, NY, USA | publisher=Cornell Lab of Ornithology | doi=10.2173/bow.viewea3.01 }}</ref>
